description: Backend data contract for Delivery Log page – tracks notification delivery across channels (SMS, Email, Push, WhatsApp).

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for the top cards (total sent, delivered, failed, delivery rate).

getDeliveryLogs.description: Fetch paginated list of delivery logs with filtering, search, and sorting.

queryParams.channel: string (optional, values: All, SMS, Email, Push, WhatsApp)
queryParams.status: string (optional, values: All, Delivered, Failed, Pending, Bounced)
queryParams.type: string (optional, values: All, Announcement, Attendance, Fee Reminder, Emergency, General)
queryParams.search: string (optional, searches recipient name, message, phone)
queryParams.sortBy: string (optional, default sentAt desc: sentAt, deliveredAt, status)

logs.type: enum: Announcement, Attendance, Fee Reminder, Emergency, General
logs.message: string (truncated for list view, full available in detail)

retryDelivery.description: Retry sending a failed delivery (increment retry count and attempt redelivery).

data.status: enum (new status, e.g., Pending or Delivered)

getFilterOptions.description: Available filter values for dropdowns (channels, statuses, types) based on existing logs or system configuration.

exportLogs.description: Export filtered logs as CSV (same query params as getDeliveryLogs, pagination ignored).
exportLogs.response: CSV file download with columns: id, recipient, phone, channel, type, message, status, sentAt, deliveredAt, deliveryTimeMs, retries

fieldNotes.deliveryTimeMs: Not stored directly, can be computed as (deliveredAt - sentAt) in milliseconds for frontend to format as '2.3s' or '45ms'.
fieldNotes.retries: Incremented each time a retry is attempted. The backend should handle actual redelivery logic.
fieldNotes.phone: May be masked in UI, but backend stores full number for sending.
fieldNotes.sentAt: ISO 8601 timestamp; frontend formats as relative time (e.g., '2m ago').
fieldNotes.deliveredAt: null if not yet delivered or failed permanently; used to compute delivery duration.
